subtitle: Professional workflow for photographers
budgetsDesc: Create, send and manage professional quotes.
contractsDesc: Generate automatic contracts and send them to clients.
selectionDesc: Let your clients choose their favorite photos.
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this budget?
errorServiceRequired: You must enter a service name.
errorItemsRequired: You must add at least one item.
createBudgetSubtitle: Create a budget for a client
createContractSubtitle: Fill in the details to generate a contract
photographerDataDesc: Personal information that will be used in contracts, budgets, and PDFs.
studioDataDesc: Commercial name, contact and data that will appear in documents.
studioLogoDesc: Upload your logo to use it in contracts, budgets, and PDFs.
allowedFormats: Allowed formats: PNG, JPG, SVG, WEBP
squareLogoTip: Tip: Use a square logo for better results in PDFs
soonFeature: We will add the selector here soon.
favoriteCurrenciesDesc: Choose the currencies you want to see first when creating a budget.
errorUploadingLogo: Error uploading logo. Check the console.
selectionSubtitle: Allow your clients to choose their favorite photos
title: Title
createSelectionSubtitle: Create a new gallery for your client to choose from
confirmDeleteSelection: Are you sure you want to delete this gallery?
noPhotosYet: No photos in this gallery yet.
maxSelectionsReached: You have reached the maximum allowed photos.
confirmFinishSelection: Are you sure you want to finish the selection? You won't be able to change it later.
errorSavingSelection: There was an error saving your selection.
selectionAlreadyCompleted: This selection has already been completed and sent to the photographer.
confirmAcceptBudget: Are you sure you want to accept this budget?
confirmRejectBudget: Are you sure you want to reject this budget?
errorSavingBudgetStatus: An error occurred while saving. Please try again.
signatureRequired: Please sign in the box before confirming.
confirmSignContract: Are you sure you want to confirm your signature?
errorSavingSignature: An error occurred while saving your signature.
galleryInstructions: Click on any photo to view it in full screen. Use the checkmark in the top corner to select your favorite photos.
galleryInstructionsPart2: Your progress is saved automatically so you can resume anytime. Once finished, click 'Finish and Send Selection' (you won't be able to make further changes). For any questions, please contact the photographer.
maxSelectionsAlert: You can select a maximum of {{max}} photos.
clientNoteLabel: Would you like to leave a comment for the photographer?
clientNoteDesc: Clarifications about cropping, retouching, or any doubts before sending your final selection.
